Notes: No. 2 seed Wayne State at No. 1 seed Concordia-St. Paul
Concordia receives auto-bid to NCAA Regional Mar. 14-17 at a site TBA
CSP defends their 2007 NSIC Tournament Title, now has 3 trny championships
